name: deck-to-video
description: Agent skill: turn a project into a self-explanatory, brand-styled deck and (later) a narrated, word-highlighted video.

scripts.demo: node scripts/extract_style.mjs examples/demo-project --out build/demo && node scripts/render_deck.mjs examples/demo-project/slides.json build/demo/theme.css --out build/demo/deck.html && node scripts/validate_deck.mjs build/demo/deck.html
